mapper.select:
SELECT MEMBER_ID as "memberId", LOGIN_ID as "loginId", NAME as "name", UPPER(GENDER) as "gender", AGE as "age", ROLE as "role", CREATED_AT as "createdAt", LAST_LOGIN_AT as "lastLoginAt" FROM MEMBER
AND LOGIN_ID LIKE '%' || #{dto.keyword} || '%' AND NAME LIKE '%' || #{dto.keyword} || '%'
AND UPPER(GENDER) = UPPER(#{dto.gender}) AND ROLE = #{dto.role}
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{dto.size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET NAME = #{name}, AGE = #{age}, GENDER = #{gender}, ROLE = #{role} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER, AGE, ROLE) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{role})
